NAVAREA XIX 79/25
  
 1.M/V RAMFORM TETHYS IS CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS FROM 12TH OF JULY 2025 
 TOWING 14 SEISMIC CABLES LENGTH 4500 METERS AND 1NM WIDTH
 IN AREA BOUNDED BY:
 A. 71-34.60N 022-23.00E
 B. 71-28.60N 022-45.70E
 C. 71-25.10N 022-36.90E
 D. 71-18.90N 023-01.20E
 E. 71-01.20N 022-18.40E
 F. 71-13.20N 021-31.20E
 2. WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, MINIMUM 3NM AHEAD AND ON BOTH SIDES, 5NM ASTERN.
 SUPPORT VESSELS THOR FREYJA AND LINDE-G IN ATTENDANCE VHF WORKING CHANNELS 88 AND 16
 3.END OF SEISMIC SURVEY: UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE
